description: After restocking shelves, an associate needs to break down the empty cardboard cartons for recycling.

nodes.task_description: Gather all empty cartons from the sales floor.

expected_outcome.expected: The associate collects the cardboard waste.

nodes.task_description: Use a box cutter to safely break down the cartons so they are flat.

expected_outcome.expected: The cartons are flattened for easier handling.

nodes.task_description: Place the flattened cardboard into the designated cardboard recycling baler.

expected_outcome.expected: The waste is properly disposed of, keeping the backroom clean and safe.
